tags.documentation: 1 = Control switch position is in stop (I/O for Monico gateway)
tags.name: Control_Switch_Stop

tags.documentation: 1 = Control switch position is in auto (I/O for Monico gateway)
tags.name: Control_Switch_Auto

tags.documentation: 1 = Control switch position is in run (I/O for Monico gateway)
tags.name: Control_Switch_Run

tags.expression:
CASE(
binEnc(getBit({[.]Summary_Alarm_Status},4),getBit({[.]Summary_Alarm_Status},5)),
0,0, // Alarm Off
1,1, // Alarm On
2,0, // Nothing - Alarm Off
3,0, // Not Available - Alarm Off
0)
tags.name: Low_Oil_Pressure_Alarm

tags.expression:
CASE(
binEnc(getBit({[.]Shutdown_Status},11),getBit({[.]Shutdown_Status},10)),
0,0, // Alarm Off
1,1, // Alarm On
2,0, // Nothing - Alarm Off
3,0, // Not Available - Alarm Off
0)
tags.name: Engine_Overspeed

tags.documentation: $00=Set remote stop is OFF, $01-$7F Set remote stop ON
tags.name: Emergency_Stop
